metadata.title: Megvax - Manage All Your Ads in One Dashboard
metadata.description: Manage Meta, Google, and TikTok ads in one place. Get more conversions with automatic optimization.

header.notif_budget_80: You have used 80% of your daily budget.

hero.title: All Your Ads,
hero.subtitle: One dashboard for every ad platform. AI finds what works, kills what doesn't.
hero.description: Meta, Google, TikTok — manage every campaign from a single screen. See what's working, fix what's not, and let AI handle the rest.
hero.benefit_2: Works with all major ad platforms

book.title: Book a Demo
book.description: See Megvax in action. Pick a time that works for you and we'll walk you through the platform.
book.benefit_duration_desc: A focused walkthrough of the platform tailored to your needs.
book.benefit_demo_desc: See real campaigns, real data, and real optimizations in action.
book.benefit_qa_desc: Ask anything about features, pricing, or integration.
book.benefit_free_desc: No commitment, no credit card required.
book.trusted_by_desc: Join advertisers who manage millions in ad spend with Megvax.
book.name: Full Name
book.notes: What would you like to discuss?
book.notes_placeholder: Tell us about your ad setup, goals, or questions...
book.booking_confirmed_desc: We'll send a confirmation email with the meeting link. See you there.
book.next_step_1: Check your email for the calendar invite
book.next_step_2: Click the meeting link at the scheduled time
book.next_step_3: We'll walk you through MegVax live
book.or_signup: Want to get started right away?
book.select_date_first: Pick a date to see available times

how_it_works.title: Three Steps.
how_it_works.subtitle: No complex onboarding. Connect, configure, done.
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Link Meta, Google, TikTok with one click. Secure OAuth — we never touch your credentials.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Define your optimization rules or use our AI presets. Budget caps, bid strategies, creative rotation — you decide.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: AI monitors 24/7, adjusts bids, pauses underperformers, scales winners. You review, it executes.

features.title: Less Tabs, More
features.subtitle: You shouldn't need 6 browser tabs to manage your ads. We built one screen that does it all.
features.f1_desc: Our AI watches your campaigns around the clock. It spots problems before you do and fixes them automatically.
features.f2_desc: Meta, Google, TikTok — all your ad accounts in one place. No more switching between platforms.
features.f3_desc: AI finds your best-performing segments and scales them. Underperformers get paused, not your budget.
features.f4_desc: Set it once: budget caps, bid rules, creative rotation. The system runs it. You approve it.
features.f5_desc: Cross-platform metrics, attribution, custom reports. See exactly where your money goes and what it brings back.
features.f6_desc: Automatic spending limits and anomaly detection. Your budget is protected even when you're not watching.

social_proof.trusted_by: Used by agencies and in-house teams managing real ad budgets
social_proof.t1_quote: We cut our weekly optimization time from 20 hours to 2. The AI suggestions are actually useful — not just noise.
social_proof.t2_quote: ROAS went up 340% in the first month. I was skeptical about AI managing bids, but the results speak for themselves.
social_proof.t3_quote: Clean interface, fast, and the automation rules actually work. First ad tool I've used that doesn't feel like it was built in 2015.

cta.title: Stop Managing Ads Manually.
cta.description: One dashboard. All platforms. AI that actually works. See it for yourself.

about.title: The Future of Ad Management
about.description: Founded in 2024, Megvax set out to make digital marketers' lives easier. Today we power thousands of businesses.
about.values_subtitle: Four core principles that shape every decision and are woven into our product's DNA.
about.value_1_desc: Our customers' success is our success. Every feature is built on this foundation.
about.value_2_desc: Don't waste time on inefficient processes. Get more results with automation.
about.value_3_desc: No hidden costs, no complex terms. Honest and open communication.
about.value_4_desc: Your data is sacred to us. Protected with the highest security standards.
about.team_subtitle: A small but focused team. We build practical solutions to big problems.
about.team_1_bio: Product vision, design, and growth strategy. Shapes MegVax by understanding what marketers actually need.
about.team_2_bio: Infrastructure, security, and scalability. Builds the system that manages thousands of accounts seamlessly.
about.team_3_bio: Our AI-powered optimization engine. Works 24/7 to drive your campaigns to peak performance.
about.careers_description: We're always looking for talented people.
about.story_subtitle: Born from a problem, growing as the solution.
about.story_description: MegVax was born to solve the complexity digital marketers face managing Meta ads. Multiple accounts, scattered data, manual optimization — we automate it all in one dashboard, powered by AI.
about.hero_description: Managing Meta ads shouldn't be complicated. At MegVax, we build AI-powered tools that empower digital marketers — so they can focus on results.
about.mission_desc: Making digital ad management accessible and efficient for everyone. Our AI-powered tools turn complex campaign optimization into a single click — so businesses can focus on growth.
about.vision_desc: A world where every business has access to ad tools as powerful as big-budget agencies. A future where automation complements human intelligence, and data-driven decisions are the norm for all.
about.timeline_1_desc: We saw firsthand the complexity marketers face in ad management and set out to build a solution.
about.timeline_2_desc: 100 businesses tested our platform during beta. Their feedback shaped the product direction.
about.timeline_3_desc: AI-powered automatic campaign optimization went live. Average ROAS increased by 40%.
about.timeline_4_desc: 150+ active businesses, ₺2M+ managed budget. Getting smarter, faster, and stronger every day.
about.cta_title: Ready to transform your ad management?
about.cta_description: Thousands of businesses are getting more conversions, lower costs, and less manual work with MegVax. Join them.

pricing.title: Simple and Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your team. Scale anytime.
pricing.starter_f2_tip: Set up simple rules like pause ad when CPC exceeds threshold
pricing.pro_f2_tip: Multi-condition rules with scheduling, audience triggers, and budget cascading
pricing.pro_f6_tip: AI analyzes your campaigns and suggests bid, audience, and creative optimizations
pricing.pro_f7_tip: Run multi-variant tests on creatives, audiences, and placements with statistical significance tracking
pricing.business_f2_tip: Build any automation workflow with our visual rule builder and API triggers
pricing.business_f6_tip: Fully autonomous AI that adjusts bids, budgets, and targeting in real-time
pricing.business_f8_tip: Connect MegVax with your CRM, BI tools, or any system via webhooks and custom APIs
pricing.comparison_subtitle: See exactly what you get with each plan.
pricing.faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
pricing.faq_1_a: Yes! All Pro plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required. You can explore every feature and decide if MegVax is right for you.
pricing.faq_2_q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing.faq_2_a: We accept credit cards, debit cards, and bank transfers. Annual plans can also be paid via invoice. All payments are processed securely.
pricing.faq_3_q: Can I change or upgrade my plan later?
pricing.faq_3_a: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade anytime from your account settings. When upgrading, you'll only pay the prorated difference. Downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.
pricing.faq_4_a: You can cancel anytime with no penalties. Your account remains active until the end of your current billing period. After that, your data is retained for 30 days in case you change your mind.
pricing.faq_5_a: Security is a top priority. We're SOC 2 compliant and GDPR-ready. All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We never share your ad data with third parties.
pricing.faq_6_q: How does the Meta integration work?
pricing.faq_6_a: Connect your Meta Business account in one click. MegVax syncs your ad accounts, campaigns, and reporting data in real-time. We're an official Meta Business Partner.
pricing.faq_a1: Sign up, connect your ad accounts, and start managing your campaigns in minutes. No complex setup required.
pricing.faq_a2: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan anytime. Changes take effect in the next billing cycle.
pricing.faq_a3: You can pay by credit card, debit card, or bank transfer. Get 2 months free with annual billing.
pricing.bottom_cta_subtitle: Join 150+ businesses already automating their Meta ad management. Start free, upgrade when you're ready.

footer.description: Manage all your ad accounts in one dashboard. Get more conversions with automatic optimization.

legal.questions_description: If you have any questions or concerns, our team is here to help. Reach out and we will get back to you promptly.
legal.privacy_collect_content:
Velkina Studio ("we", "us", "our"), operating the MegVax platform, collects the following categories of information:

Account Information: When you register for MegVax, we collect your full name, email address, company name, billing address, and payment details. This information is necessary to create and maintain your account.

Usage Data: We automatically collect data about how you interact with our platform, including pages visited, features used, session duration, and the actions you take within the dashboard.

Ad Account Data: When you connect your Meta advertising accounts, we access campaign performance metrics, ad spend data, audience information, and creative assets solely to provide our optimization services.

Device & Technical Data: We collect your IP address, browser type and version, operating system, device identifiers, and referring URLs for security, analytics, and service improvement purposes.
legal.privacy_use_content:
We process your personal data for the following purposes:

Service Delivery: To operate the MegVax platform, process your ad optimization requests, generate performance reports, and deliver AI-powered recommendations.

Billing & Transactions: To process subscription payments, issue invoices, manage refunds, and maintain accurate financial records.

Communications: To send essential service notifications, security alerts, billing confirmations, and product updates. You may opt out of non-essential communications at any time.

Platform Improvement: To analyze aggregate usage patterns, identify bugs, develop new features, and improve the overall user experience. Individual user data is never used for purposes unrelated to service operation.

Legal Compliance: To comply with applicable laws, respond to lawful requests from public authorities, and protect our legal rights.
legal.privacy_share_content:
Velkina Studio does not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. We may share data in the following limited circumstances:

Service Providers: We work with trusted third-party vendors for payment processing (Stripe), cloud infrastructure (hosting providers), email delivery, and analytics. These providers are contractually bound to process data only as instructed and to maintain appropriate security measures.

Legal Requirements: We may disclose information when required by law, court order, or governmental regulation, or when we believe disclosure is necessary to protect our rights, your safety, or the safety of others.

Business Transfers: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your data may be transferred as part of the transaction. We will notify you of any such change.

Your Meta ad account data is never shared with third parties for their own purposes and is used exclusively to provide the MegVax service.
legal.privacy_retention_content:
We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy:

Account Data: Retained for the duration of your active subscription and for 30 days following account termination, after which it is permanently deleted.

Billing Records: Retained for 5 years to comply with Turkish tax and commercial law requirements.

Usage & Analytics Data: Retained in anonymized, aggregate form indefinitely for service improvement. Individual usage data is deleted within 12 months of account closure.

Ad Account Data: Deleted within 7 days of disconnecting your Meta account or terminating your subscription.
legal.privacy_security_content:
We implement industry-standard technical and organizational measures to protect your data:

All data in transit is encrypted using TLS 1.3. Data at rest is encrypted using AES-256 encryption. We conduct regular security audits and vulnerability assessments. Access to personal data is restricted to authorized personnel on a need-to-know basis. We maintain detailed access logs and monitor for unauthorized access attempts.

While no system is completely immune to security threats, we are committed to promptly investigating and addressing any security incidents. In the event of a data breach that poses a risk to your rights, we will notify you and the relevant supervisory authority without undue delay.
legal.privacy_rights_content:
Under applicable data protection laws, including the Turkish Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK) and, where applicable, the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:

Right of Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.

Right to Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.

Right to Erasure: Request deletion of your personal data, subject to legal retention requirements.

Right to Data Portability: Receive your data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format.

Right to Object: Object to processing of your data for specific purposes.

Right to Withdraw Consent: Withdraw previously given consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at destek@megvax.com. We will respond within 30 days.
legal.privacy_cookies_content:
MegVax uses cookies and similar technologies to operate and improve the platform. For detailed information about the types of cookies we use, their purposes, and how to manage them, please refer to our Cookie Policy.

We use essential cookies required for authentication and security, analytics cookies to understand how the platform is used, and optional marketing cookies for campaign measurement. You can manage your preferences at any time through our cookie settings or your browser configuration.
legal.privacy_contact_content:
For privacy-related inquiries, data access requests, or complaints, please contact:

Velkina Studio
Data Protection Contact
Email: destek@megvax.com
Alternative: support@megvax.com
Address: Istanbul, Turkey

We will acknowledge your request within 7 business days and provide a substantive response within 30 days. If you are not satisfied with our response, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Turkish Personal Data Protection Authority (KVKK) or your local supervisory authority.
legal.terms_acceptance_content:
These Terms of Service ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement between you ("User", "you") and Velkina Studio ("Company", "we", "us"), a company registered in Istanbul, Turkey, governing your access to and use of the MegVax platform and all related services.

By creating an account, accessing, or using MegVax in any way, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms, as well as our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy. If you do not agree to these Terms, you must not use the platform.

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or in-platform notification at least 14 days before taking effect. Your continued use of MegVax after such notice constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
legal.terms_service_content:
MegVax is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform that provides Meta advertising management tools, including but not limited to:

Automated campaign monitoring and optimization powered by artificial intelligence.
Performance analytics, reporting, and budget tracking across connected Meta ad accounts.
AI-generated recommendations for bid adjustments, audience targeting, and budget allocation.
Automation rules for pausing underperforming ads and scaling successful campaigns.

The platform is provided "as is" and "as available." We continuously work to improve MegVax but do not guarantee uninterrupted, error-free, or always-available service. Scheduled maintenance windows will be communicated in advance when possible.
legal.terms_accounts_content:
To use MegVax, you must create an account by providing accurate and complete information. You are responsible for:

Maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.
All activity that occurs under your account, whether or not authorized by you.
Promptly notifying us of any unauthorized access or security breach at destek@megvax.com.

You must be at least 18 years old and have the legal capacity to enter into a binding agreement. If you are using MegVax on behalf of a company or organization, you represent that you have the authority to bind that entity to these Terms.

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms, engage in fraudulent activity, or pose a security risk to the platform.
legal.terms_payment_content:
MegVax operates on a subscription basis. By subscribing, you agree to the following:

Subscription fees are billed in advance on a monthly or annual basis, depending on your selected plan.
All prices are displayed in the applicable currency and are exclusive of applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.
Payments are processed securely through our payment provider. We do not store your full payment card details.
Your subscription will automatically renew at the end of each billing period unless you cancel before the renewal date.
We may adjust pricing with at least 30 days written notice. Price changes will apply to the next billing cycle following the notice period.

Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis. If you believe you have been charged in error, contact destek@megvax.com within 14 days of the charge.
legal.terms_ip_content:
All intellectual property rights in the MegVax platform, including but not limited to the software, algorithms, user interface designs, branding, documentation, and any content we produce, are and remain the exclusive property of Velkina Studio.

You retain full ownership of your data, including ad account data, campaign content, and any materials you upload to the platform. By using MegVax, you grant us a limited, non-exclusive, revocable license to access and process your data solely for the purpose of providing the service.

You may not copy, modify, distribute, reverse-engineer, decompile, or create derivative works based on any part of the MegVax platform without our prior written consent.
legal.terms_limitation_content:
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law:

Velkina Studio shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of revenue, loss of data, loss of business opportunities, or advertising spend losses arising from the use of our AI recommendations.

Our total aggregate liability for any claims arising out of or related to these Terms or the use of MegVax shall not exceed the total fees paid by you to Velkina Studio during the twelve (12) months immediately preceding the event giving rise to the claim.

MegVax provides AI-powered recommendations and automation tools as decision-support aids. All advertising decisions and their outcomes remain your sole responsibility. We do not guarantee any specific advertising results, return on ad spend, or campaign performance.
legal.terms_termination_content:
Either party may terminate this agreement at any time:

You may cancel your subscription through the platform settings or by contacting destek@megvax.com. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.

We may terminate or suspend your account immediately if you breach these Terms, engage in fraudulent or illegal activity, or if required by law.

Upon termination: your access to MegVax ceases immediately; your data will be retained for 30 days to allow you to export it; after 30 days, all personal and account data will be permanently deleted, except where retention is required by law.

Sections relating to intellectual property, limitation of liability, and governing law survive termination.
legal.terms_governing_content:
These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Turkey, without regard to conflict of law principles.

Any dispute arising out of or in connection with these Terms shall first be attempted to be resolved amicably through direct negotiation. If no resolution is reached within 30 days, the dispute shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Istanbul, Turkey.

If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

For any questions about these Terms, contact us at destek@megvax.com or support@megvax.com.
legal.cookies_what_content:
Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when you visit the MegVax website or use our platform. They are widely used to make websites work efficiently, provide a better user experience, and supply information to site operators.

Some cookies are essential for the platform to function correctly, while others help us understand how you use our service so we can improve it. This policy explains what cookies we use, why we use them, and how you can control them.
legal.cookies_types_content:
Essential Cookies: These are strictly necessary for the operation of MegVax. They enable core functionality such as user authentication, session management, security features, and remembering your language preference. Without these cookies, the platform cannot function properly. These cookies do not require your consent.

Analytics Cookies: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with MegVax by collecting information about pages visited, time spent on the platform, error messages encountered, and navigation patterns. We use this data in aggregate to improve the platform. Provider: Google Analytics.

Functional Cookies: These cookies remember choices you make (such as your dashboard layout preferences, timezone settings, or notification preferences) to provide a more personalized experience.

Marketing Cookies: These cookies track your activity across websites to help deliver more relevant advertising and measure the effectiveness of our marketing campaigns. These cookies are optional and are only set with your explicit consent.
legal.cookies_purpose_content:
We use cookies for the following specific purposes:

Authentication: To verify your identity when you log in and maintain your session while you use the platform.

Security: To detect and prevent fraudulent activity, unauthorized access, and other security threats.

Preferences: To remember your settings and preferences so you do not have to re-enter them each time you visit.

Analytics: To measure and analyze how our platform is used, which features are popular, and where users encounter issues, enabling us to make data-driven improvements.

Performance: To monitor platform performance, load times, and error rates to ensure a reliable experience.
legal.cookies_manage_content:
You have several options for managing cookies:

Cookie Banner: When you first visit MegVax, you will see a cookie consent banner that allows you to accept all cookies or limit them to essential cookies only.

Browser Settings: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can typically set your browser to block all cookies, accept all cookies, or notify you when a cookie is being set. The method for doing this varies by browser.

Opt-Out Links: For Google Analytics, you can install the Google Analytics Opt-Out Browser Add-on.

Please note that disabling essential cookies will prevent the MegVax platform from functioning correctly. Disabling analytics or marketing cookies will not affect core platform functionality.
legal.cookies_thirdparty_content:
Some cookies on MegVax are placed by third-party services that we use:

Google Analytics: Used to collect anonymous usage statistics. Google’s privacy policy applies to data collected by these cookies.

Stripe: Our payment processor may set cookies necessary for secure payment processing.

Meta (Facebook): If you connect your Meta ad accounts, Meta may set cookies related to the authentication and data exchange process.

We do not control the cookies set by these third parties. We encourage you to review their respective privacy and cookie policies.

For any questions about our use of cookies, contact us at destek@megvax.com or support@megvax.com. Velkina Studio, Istanbul, Turkey.

landing.hero_title: Automate your Meta ads with one click.
landing.hero_subtitle: Connect your accounts, AI pauses underperformers and scales winners. You just approve.
landing.hero_trust: 14 days free · No credit card required
landing.before_after_subtitle: Sound familiar? MegVax eliminates this routine.
landing.step1_desc: Link your Meta accounts with one click. Secure OAuth, ready in 2 minutes.
landing.step2_desc: ROAS targets, budget limits, pause rules — you decide, AI executes.
landing.step3_desc: Monitors 24/7, adjusts bids, pauses losers, scales winners. You approve.
landing.feature_autopilot_desc: AI pauses low-ROAS ads, increases budget on winners. 24/7.
landing.feature_suggestions_desc: AI tells you what to do, you approve with one click.
landing.feature_dashboard_desc: All Meta accounts, campaigns, and metrics on one screen.
landing.cta_subtitle: Connect your account, let AI handle the rest.
landing.cta_trust: 14 days free · No credit card required · Cancel anytime
landing.footer_tagline: The AI platform that automates your Meta ads.
landing.testimonial_1_quote: Before MegVax, I spent 2 hours every morning in Meta Ads Manager. Now I read the reports while my coffee brews — AI handles the rest.
landing.testimonial_2_quote: I manage 5 brands. Logging into each account to adjust bids was a nightmare. MegVax shows everything in one panel and stops losing ads before I even notice.
landing.testimonial_3_quote: I was skeptical the first week but an ad AI paused had burned ₺6,000 in the last 3 days. That single decision paid for MegVax.
landing.features_subtitle: Every feature solves a problem. No fluff, just results.
landing.suggestion_description: "Summer Collection" hit 4.2x ROAS in the last 3 days. We recommend increasing the budget from ₺500 to ₺750.
landing.platforms_trusted_subtitle: Brands running ads on Facebook, Instagram, Google and more
landing.what_it_does_section_subtitle: Every feature solves a problem. No fluff, just results.
landing.what_it_does_feature1_desc: AI pauses low-ROAS ads and increases budget on winners. Runs 24/7, even while you sleep.
landing.what_it_does_feature2_desc: AI tells you what to do — increase budget, change targeting, pause campaign. You approve with one click.
landing.what_it_does_feature3_desc: All Meta accounts, campaigns, and metrics on one screen. No more switching between accounts or tab chaos.
landing.showcase_section_subtitle: Real screens, real data. Seeing is believing.

errors.global_description: An unexpected error occurred. Try refreshing the page. If the problem persists, contact us.
